_platform_notes.note: MCP config for Claude Code sessions in the mom-ai-app workspace. Langfuse observability is already wired at the app level via LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY/SECRET_KEY/HOST env vars in mom-alpha/.env.

firecrawl._note: Firecrawl MCP — reliable web scraping returning clean markdown/JSON. Handles JS rendering and anti-bot. Used by: research during feature development, scraping activity/event data sources.

tavily._note: Tavily MCP — real-time web search optimized for AI agents. Used by: activity recommendation research, family event discovery, market research during feature planning.
